posts.text:
Bitcoin is up 3% today.

ETH holding above $1,870.

The market is pricing in something the headlines haven't caught yet.

Usually how it works.
posts.rationale: Concise observation with data points. Market timing angle creates intrigue without claiming certainty.

posts.text:
While CT debates whether this is a dead cat bounce or the start of something bigger, I'm watching one thing:

Volume.

Today's move has legs if institutional flow confirms it tomorrow.

action_required: Copy main post text and publish at 19:00 CET
